response.global_analysis: Audio contains spoken English and Italian closing remarks by Raora. No song lyrics were present in this specific clip, so the reference JSON was discarded for this segment. Timing is strictly dictated by vocal bursts. On-screen text at the end provides a final heartfelt message and is transcribed for clarity.

subtitles.original: Ah... That was so much fun!
subtitles.english: Ah... That was so much fun!

subtitles.original: How did you like it, Chattini?
subtitles.english: How did you like it, Chattini?

subtitles.original: Thank you for watching and listening!
subtitles.english: Thank you for watching and listening!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much everyone for all your support!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much everyone for all your support!

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, Chattini! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, Chattini! Thank you!

subtitles.original: I can't wait to see you all again!
subtitles.english: I can't wait to see you all again!

subtitles.original: Thank you Chattini for all your support!
subtitles.english: Thank you Chattini for all your support!

subtitles.original: I still can't believe this day finally came!
subtitles.english: I still can't believe this day finally came!
